positive: A hyper-detailed, ethereal illustration of a glowing bioluminescent forest at dusk. Giant mushrooms, glowing flora, and mystical particles drift through the air. Style of Studio Ghibli meets Art Nouveau, deep emerald and sapphire tones, cinematic lighting, octane render.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, jpeg artifacts, oversaturated, harsh shadows
